name: Don't Look Back
short_description: Don't Look Back is a VR Horror, Puzzle solving game.
detailed_description:
Don't Look Back is a VR Horror, Puzzle solving game.

Compared to other common VR games, we have developed a NEW movement system.
Instead of standing or moving in a limited area, the Don't Look Back uses a unique method.

With this new movement system, we can now move around in a much larger place and
most importantly, we WON’T GET DIZZY anymore!!

Now, with a much wider area, come on and explore, solve the puzzles and
GET SCARED!
